current_markdown:
# Requirement Brief

## Goal
Provide a feature that calculates the loan duration based on monthly rate, loan amount, and interest rate.

## Business Context
This is a quality-of-life feature for customers and internal staff. It is intended to improve the loan estimation process and make it easier to determine loan duration quickly.

## Users
Customers.

## Functional Requirements
- The system must calculate loan duration using monthly rate, loan amount, and interest rate as inputs.
- The system must return the calculated loan duration to the user.
- No additional calculation rules have been specified.

## Non-Functional Requirements
- Performance is a key requirement.
- The feature must support security expectations required to maintain certification.
- The feature must support auditability.
- The feature must comply with certification-related compliance requirements.

## Risks and Dependencies
- No known risks, blockers, or external dependencies have been identified at this time.

## Open Questions
- None identified at this time.
